title: Castle in the Sky
synopsis: A young boy and a girl with a mysterious crystal pendant race sky pirates and government agents to find a legendary floating castle.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
synopsis: Two siblings struggle to survive in the final months of World War II Japan after losing their home and family.

title: My Neighbor Totoro
synopsis: Two young sisters move to the countryside and befriend gentle forest spirits while their mother recovers from illness.

title: Kiki's Delivery Service
synopsis: A young witch leaves home to spend a year living independently in a new town with her talking black cat.

title: Only Yesterday
synopsis: A woman on a countryside trip reflects on episodes from her childhood in 1960s Tokyo.

title: Porco Rosso
synopsis: A cursed World War I flying ace turned bounty hunter, now with the face of a pig, battles air pirates over the Adriatic Sea.

title: Pom Poko
synopsis: A community of shape-shifting raccoon dogs wages a magical campaign to stop suburban development from destroying their forest home.

title: Whisper of the Heart
synopsis: A bookish teenage girl discovers a mysterious cat and a boy who inspire her to pursue her dream of becoming a writer.

title: Princess Mononoke
synopsis: A young prince cursed by a demon travels west and becomes entangled in a war between forest gods and a mining settlement.

title: My Neighbors the Yamadas
synopsis: A loosely connected series of comic vignettes following the everyday joys and squabbles of an ordinary Japanese family.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: A ten-year-old girl becomes trapped in a spirit world and must work in a bathhouse to save her parents and find her way home.

title: The Cat Returns
synopsis: After saving a cat prince from an oncoming truck, a teenage girl finds herself whisked away to the mysterious Cat Kingdom.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
synopsis: A young woman cursed with old age seeks refuge in the walking castle of an enigmatic wizard rumored to devour the hearts of girls.

title: Tales from Earthsea
synopsis: A troubled prince and a wizard search for the cause of a growing imbalance spreading across the world of Earthsea.

title: Ponyo
synopsis: A goldfish princess longs to become human after befriending a five-year-old boy who lives on a seaside cliff.

title: Arrietty
synopsis: A tiny teenage girl from a family of secret miniature people forms a forbidden friendship with a boy in the house where she lives.

title: From Up on Poppy Hill
synopsis: In 1963 Yokohama, a high school girl and boy work together to save their school's clubhouse and uncover a shared secret from the past.

title: The Wind Rises
synopsis: A fictionalized account of the life of Jiro Horikoshi, the designer of Japanese fighter aircraft, and his dreams of flight.

title: The Tale of the Princess Kaguya
synopsis: A tiny girl found inside a glowing bamboo stalk grows miraculously fast and is drawn into a life of courtly expectation she never wanted.

title: When Marnie Was There
synopsis: A withdrawn young girl sent to the countryside for her health forms an intense friendship with a mysterious girl living in an old mansion.

title: Earwig and the Witch
synopsis: An orphan girl with a stubborn streak is adopted by a witch and sets out to bend the rules of her strange new household to her will.

title: The Boy and the Heron
synopsis: A grieving boy follows a talking grey heron into a crumbling tower and a fantastical world shared by the living and the dead.
